title: Contact info
body:
It appears both of the contact locations are either non-existent or locked. 

Freenode channel has 0 users and the Google Group is unavailable.

comments.body:
It should likely just link to https://github.com/containers#-community or https://podman.io/community

I don't think it makes much sense to maintain separate channel for c/image, and other than that github issues are always fine as well.

cc @mtrmac Any preferences?

Yes — if we should be pointing at any chat channel, let’s use those.

(But, also, I’m not currently participating in any of these chats, so GitHub issues might be the preferred location for discussion, anyway… Still, pointing at a single place for people who want to participate would still be beneficial, as a way to coordinate.)
